description: Metabase dashboard definitions. Queries run against Postgres tables that mirror CSVs under data/; anomaly_results comes from the anomaly worker.

dashboards.name: CloudWalk — Anomaly monitoring
dashboards.description: Detector scores, alert levels, and CRITICAL rows (anomaly_results).

cards.name: Anomaly score over time
cards.sql: SELECT "timestamp" AS ts, anomaly_score::double precision AS anomaly_score FROM anomaly_results ORDER BY "timestamp" ASC LIMIT 3000

cards.name: Alerts by level (anomalies only)
cards.sql: SELECT alert_level, COUNT(*)::int AS cnt FROM anomaly_results WHERE is_anomaly = true GROUP BY alert_level ORDER BY cnt DESC

cards.name: Anomaly score buckets (0–1)
cards.sql: SELECT width_bucket(anomaly_score::numeric, 0::numeric, 1::numeric, 20) AS bucket, COUNT(*)::int AS cnt FROM anomaly_results GROUP BY bucket ORDER BY bucket

cards.name: Recent CRITICAL anomalies
cards.sql: SELECT id, "timestamp", anomaly_score, triggered_rules, notified_at IS NOT NULL AS notified FROM anomaly_results WHERE alert_level = 'CRITICAL' ORDER BY anomaly_score DESC NULLS LAST LIMIT 40

cards.name: Pending notifications (count)
cards.sql: SELECT COUNT(*)::int AS pending FROM anomaly_results WHERE is_anomaly AND notified_at IS NULL

cards.name: Total anomaly_result rows
cards.sql: SELECT COUNT(*)::int AS total FROM anomaly_results

dashboards.name: CloudWalk — Transactions & operational data
dashboards.description: Minute transactions, auth codes, checkout, operational intelligence (same data as CSV imports).

cards.name: Approved transactions per hour
cards.sql: SELECT date_trunc('hour', "timestamp") AS hr, SUM(count)::bigint AS total FROM transactions WHERE status = 'approved' GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

cards.name: Denied transactions per hour
cards.sql: SELECT date_trunc('hour', "timestamp") AS hr, SUM(count)::bigint AS total FROM transactions WHERE status = 'denied' GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

cards.name: Auth code 51 — hourly count
cards.sql: SELECT date_trunc('hour', "timestamp") AS hr, SUM(count)::bigint AS total FROM transactions_auth_codes WHERE auth_code::text = '51' GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

cards.name: Auth code 59 — hourly count
cards.sql: SELECT date_trunc('hour', "timestamp") AS hr, SUM(count)::bigint AS total FROM transactions_auth_codes WHERE auth_code::text = '59' GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

cards.name: Checkout — today vs yesterday vs averages
cards.sql: SELECT time, today, yesterday, same_day_last_week, avg_last_week, avg_last_month FROM checkout ORDER BY time

cards.name: Operational intelligence — daily volume (sum)
cards.sql: SELECT day::date AS d, SUM(amount_transacted)::double precision AS volume FROM transactions_db GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1 DESC LIMIT 90

cards.name: Transactions sample (latest 200 rows)
cards.sql: SELECT "timestamp", status, count FROM transactions ORDER BY "timestamp" DESC LIMIT 200

dashboards.name: CloudWalk — Minute monitoring
dashboards.description: Denied / failed / reversals per minute with 60m rolling averages. SQL is self-contained (no DB views required).

cards.name: Denied per minute + 60m rolling avg
cards.sql: WITH pivot AS ( SELECT date_trunc('minute', t."timestamp") AS minute_ts, SUM(CASE WHEN t.status = 'denied' THEN t.count ELSE 0 END) AS denied, SUM(CASE WHEN t.status = 'failed' THEN t.count ELSE 0 END) AS failed, SUM(CASE WHEN t.status = 'reversed' THEN t.count ELSE 0 END) AS reversed, SUM(CASE WHEN t.status = 'backend_reversed' THEN t.count ELSE 0 END) AS backend_reversed FROM transactions t GROUP BY 1 ), roll AS ( SELECT minute_ts, denied, failed, reversed, backend_reversed, AVG(denied::numeric) OVER (ORDER BY minute_ts ROWS BETWEEN 59 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) AS denied_rolling_avg_60m, AVG(failed::numeric) OVER (ORDER BY minute_ts ROWS BETWEEN 59 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) AS failed_rolling_avg_60m, AVG(reversed::numeric) OVER (ORDER BY minute_ts ROWS BETWEEN 59 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) AS reversed_rolling_avg_60m FROM pivot ) SELECT minute_ts, denied::double precision AS denied, denied_rolling_avg_60m::double precision AS avg_60m FROM roll ORDER BY minute_ts

cards.name: Failed per minute + 60m rolling avg
cards.sql: WITH pivot AS ( SELECT date_trunc('minute', t."timestamp") AS minute_ts, SUM(CASE WHEN t.status = 'denied' THEN t.count ELSE 0 END) AS denied, SUM(CASE WHEN t.status = 'failed' THEN t.count ELSE 0 END) AS failed, SUM(CASE WHEN t.status = 'reversed' THEN t.count ELSE 0 END) AS reversed, SUM(CASE WHEN t.status = 'backend_reversed' THEN t.count ELSE 0 END) AS backend_reversed FROM transactions t GROUP BY 1 ), roll AS ( SELECT minute_ts, denied, failed, reversed, backend_reversed, AVG(denied::numeric) OVER (ORDER BY minute_ts ROWS BETWEEN 59 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) AS denied_rolling_avg_60m, AVG(failed::numeric) OVER (ORDER BY minute_ts ROWS BETWEEN 59 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) AS failed_rolling_avg_60m, AVG(reversed::numeric) OVER (ORDER BY minute_ts ROWS BETWEEN 59 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) AS reversed_rolling_avg_60m FROM pivot ) SELECT minute_ts, failed::double precision AS failed, failed_rolling_avg_60m::double precision AS avg_60m FROM roll ORDER BY minute_ts

cards.name: Reversed per minute + 60m rolling avg
cards.sql: WITH pivot AS ( SELECT date_trunc('minute', t."timestamp") AS minute_ts, SUM(CASE WHEN t.status = 'denied' THEN t.count ELSE 0 END) AS denied, SUM(CASE WHEN t.status = 'failed' THEN t.count ELSE 0 END) AS failed, SUM(CASE WHEN t.status = 'reversed' THEN t.count ELSE 0 END) AS reversed, SUM(CASE WHEN t.status = 'backend_reversed' THEN t.count ELSE 0 END) AS backend_reversed FROM transactions t GROUP BY 1 ), roll AS ( SELECT minute_ts, denied, failed, reversed, backend_reversed, AVG(denied::numeric) OVER (ORDER BY minute_ts ROWS BETWEEN 59 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) AS denied_rolling_avg_60m, AVG(failed::numeric) OVER (ORDER BY minute_ts ROWS BETWEEN 59 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) AS failed_rolling_avg_60m, AVG(reversed::numeric) OVER (ORDER BY minute_ts ROWS BETWEEN 59 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) AS reversed_rolling_avg_60m FROM pivot ) SELECT minute_ts, reversed::double precision AS reversed, reversed_rolling_avg_60m::double precision AS avg_60m FROM roll ORDER BY minute_ts

cards.name: Backend reversed per minute (raw)
cards.sql: SELECT date_trunc('minute', t."timestamp") AS minute_ts, SUM(CASE WHEN t.status = 'backend_reversed' THEN t.count ELSE 0 END)::double precision AS backend_reversed FROM transactions t GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY minute_ts

cards.name: Latest minute-level snapshot
cards.sql: WITH pivot AS ( SELECT date_trunc('minute', t."timestamp") AS minute_ts, SUM(CASE WHEN t.status = 'denied' THEN t.count ELSE 0 END) AS denied, SUM(CASE WHEN t.status = 'failed' THEN t.count ELSE 0 END) AS failed, SUM(CASE WHEN t.status = 'reversed' THEN t.count ELSE 0 END) AS reversed, SUM(CASE WHEN t.status = 'backend_reversed' THEN t.count ELSE 0 END) AS backend_reversed FROM transactions t GROUP BY 1 ), roll AS ( SELECT minute_ts, denied, failed, reversed, backend_reversed, AVG(denied::numeric) OVER (ORDER BY minute_ts ROWS BETWEEN 59 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) AS denied_rolling_avg_60m, AVG(failed::numeric) OVER (ORDER BY minute_ts ROWS BETWEEN 59 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) AS failed_rolling_avg_60m, AVG(reversed::numeric) OVER (ORDER BY minute_ts ROWS BETWEEN 59 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) AS reversed_rolling_avg_60m FROM pivot ) SELECT * FROM roll ORDER BY minute_ts DESC LIMIT 60
